description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with a predominantly white and yellow color scheme. The front features a playful illustration of a pineapple wearing blue sunglasses, with the words 'EASY MOUZUO' and 'pineapple nectar' or 'boisson d'ananas' prominently displayed above. The sides of the carton display detailed nutritional information and product details in black text on a white background. The top of the carton is yellow with a small red pull tab closure, typical of juice cartons. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with a thin plastic lining to contain the liquid inside. The overall design is bright and inviting, with clear branding and flavor cues.
description: A 1-liter rectangular juice carton with a yellow and white design, featuring a pineapple with sunglasses and clear branding. The packaging includes a red pull tab and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'EASY MOUZUO' brand, a pineapple with sunglasses, and French product labeling.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and product details in black text.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with English labeling, 'pineapple nectar', and the same pineapple illustration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional product information and a barcode at the bottom.
